responsibilities: Analyze end-to-end operational processes to identify bottlenecks, waste, and opportunities for efficiency improvement
Apply Lean and Six Sigma methodologies to redesign workflows and reduce cycle times across manufacturing or service operations
Build cost models to quantify potential savings from proposed operational changes and prioritize improvement initiatives
Conduct supply chain assessments evaluating inventory levels, supplier performance, and logistics network efficiency
Facilitate process improvement workshops with frontline staff and operations leadership to co-create solution designs
Develop standard operating procedures and performance dashboards to sustain operational improvements after implementation
Lead pilot programs testing process changes on a small scale before full-scale rollout across client operations
Present operational diagnostic findings and improvement roadmaps to plant managers and senior operations executives
